name: K.Michelle: My Life
overview: Reality show following the daily life of the fabulous K Michelle. Through her busy schedule, heartbreaks, and friend drama, Kimberly always finds a way to come out on top be turning her pain into music.

trailers.title: K. Michelle: My Life | Season 3 Super Trailer | Premieres December 19 + 9:30/8:30C | VH1
